title: FDDI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff Posts
post_name: Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff
short_info: Footwear Design & Development Institute (FDDI) has released the official Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff Notification 2026 on the official website. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced under the FDDI Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications ranging from 8th Pass, 10th Pass, 12th Pass, Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree with Diploma in Footwear Design, Master Degree/PG Diploma in Design/Leather Design, or Master Degree in Management/Retail, and aged up to 35 years can apply online from the release date up to 11 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online applica

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: 8th Pass, 10th Pass, 12th Pass, Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree with Diploma in Footwear Design, Master Degree/PG Diploma in Design/Leather Design, Master Degree in Management/Retail
qualification.details: Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Footwear Design & Production: Essential 8th Pass, Desirable 10th Pass. Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Fashion Design: Essential 8th Pass, Desirable 10th Pass. Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Leather Goods & Accessories Design: 12th Pass or above. Junior Faculty, Footwear Design & Production: Bachelor’s degree or Master’s Degree (minimum 2 years after Graduation) in any field with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university/institute, and Diploma (minimum 1 year duration) in Footwear Design and Manufacturing or Production/Footwear Technology (specialization in design)/Product Design/Design/Accessories Design/Fashion Design from a recognized university/institute OR Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Footwear Technology (specialization in design/Footwear Design and Manufacturing or Production/Product Design/Design/Accessories Design/Fashion Design) with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university/institute. Junior Faculty, Leather Goods & Accessories Design: Master Degree of minimum 02 years duration after Graduation or PG Diploma of minimum 2 years duration after graduation in Design / Leather Design /Apparel Design / Garment Manufacturing Technology / Leather Goods & Accessories Design/ Leather Garments with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University / Institute OR Master’s Degree of minimum 02 years duration or PG Diploma (of minimum 02 years duration after Graduation) in any field from a recognized University or institute and Bachelor Degree of Diploma (of minimum 03 years duration ) in Design / Leather Design /Apparel Design / Garment Manufacturing Technology / Leather Goods & Accessories Design/ Leather Garments with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University / Institute. Junior Faculty, Retail Operations: Master Degree or Master Diploma of 2 years in relevant field with minimum 55% marks or equivalent and 3 Years relevant experience. Junior Faculty, Fashion Merchandise: Master Degree (of min. 02 years after Graduation) or PG Diploma (of min. 02 years after Graduation) in Management/ International Business / Fashion Merchandise/ Marketing / Finance/ Retail / HR with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University / Institute.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Footwear Design & Production
Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Fashion Design
Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Leather Goods & Accessories Design
Junior Faculty, Leather Goods & Accessories Design

salary_details.details: Jr. Lab Assistant (All Schools): Rs. 30,000/- per month Junior Faculty (Footwear Design & Production): Rs. 50,000/- per month Junior Faculty (Leather Goods & Accessories Design): Rs. 50,000/- per month Junior Faculty (Retail Operations): Rs. 50,000/- per month Junior Faculty (Fashion Merchandise): Rs. 50,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the FDDI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of FDDI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the FDDI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the FDDI recruitment is 11th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by FDDI?
faq.answer: FDDI has announced a total of 8 vacancies for the posts of Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff. These positions are spread across various schools within the institute.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Jr. Lab Assistant posts?
faq.answer: For Jr. Lab Assistant posts in the School of Footwear Design & Production and School of Fashion Design, an 8th pass is essential, with a 10th pass being desirable. For the School of Leather Goods & Accessories Design, a 12th pass or above is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Junior Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Junior Faculty positions is 35 years. There is no mention of age relaxation for specific categories in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the FDDI recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this FDDI recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Junior Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The Junior Faculty positions offer a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- per month, depending on the specific role and qualifications.

faq.question: Q7. Which mode of application is accepted by FDDI for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online for the FDDI recruitment. The application process is conducted through the official FDDI website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these FDDI posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff posts at FDDI will be based on an Interview. Candidates shortlisted after the initial screening will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any specific experience requirements for the Junior Faculty, Retail Operations post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Junior Faculty, Retail Operations post, candidates need to have a Master Degree or Master Diploma of 2 years in a relevant field with minimum 55% marks or equivalent, along with 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for FDDI Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the "Official Notification PDF" link provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
